scripts.build: echo 'Building CSS...' && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./public/css/styles.css -o ./public/css/output.css && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./public/css/styles.css -o ./css/output.css && echo 'CSS build complete!' && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist', 'build', 'out'].forEach(d => fs.mkdirSync(d, { recursive: true }))"
